userEnteredValue.formulaValue:
=sort({
iferror(
ArrayFormula(query({'Split Those Mixes'!$A$2:$L},
"Select "&join(", ","Col"&MATCH($A$1:$G$1,MixHeader,0))
&" where Col"&MATCH($F$1,MixHeader,0)&">0",0))
,MAKEARRAY(1,countA($1:$1),lambda(rows,col,"")))
;ArrayFormula(query({'Sales Plan 301'!$A$2:$L},
"Select "&join(", ","Col"&MATCH($A$1:$G$1,PlanHeader,0))
&" where Col"&MATCH($F$1,PlanHeader,0)&">0"&" and Col"&MATCH("Category",PlanHeader,0)&"<>'Mixes'"&" and Col"&MATCH("Category",PlanHeader,0)&"<>'Resale'",0))
},3,TRUE,4,TRUE,2,TRUE,1,TRUE)

unique_formula_skeletons:
=sort({
iferror(
ArrayFormula(query({'Split Those Mixes'!<RANGE>:$L},
"Select "&join(", ","Col"&MATCH(<RANGE>,MixHeader,<N>))
&" where Col"&MATCH(<RANGE>,MixHeader,<N>)&"><N>",<N>))
,MAKEARRAY(<N>,countA($<N>:$<N>),lambda(rows,col,"")))
;ArrayFormula(query({'Sales Plan <N>'!<RANGE>:$L},
"Select "&join(", ","Col"&MATCH(<RANGE>,PlanHeader,<N>))
&" where Col"&MATCH(<RANGE>,PlanHeader,<N>)&"><N>"&" and Col"&MATCH("Category",PlanHeader,<N>)&"<>'Mixes'"&" and Col"&MATCH("Category",PlanHeader,<N>)&"<>'Resale'",<N>))
},<N>,TRUE,<N>,TRUE,<N>,TRUE,<N>,TRUE)
